Liver Function Tests 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/liver-function-tests/ 
Liver Function Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are liver function tests? 
Liver function tests (also called a liver panel) use a sample of your blood to measure several substances made by your liver.
The most common liver function tests measure:
Albumin , a protein made in the liver. 
Total protein . This test measures the total amount of protein in your blood, which includes albumin and globulins. These protei
